finite_box_neutrality_scheme: I3- replaces one free I- and I2Br- replaces one free Br- while adding one I2-equivalent load; free I2 is neutral. This preserves explicit PME neutrality but is a finite-box load-series prior, not a closed-cell mass-balance model.

force_field_notes.ion_parameters: Reuses md_transport_local Stage A ion/NH4/I2 setup; Zn2+ is the documented SPC/E 12-6 approximation, not full Li-Merz 12-6-4 C4.
force_field_notes.polyhalide_note: I3-/I2Br- use rebuilt linear geometries and xTB ALPB-water charges from md_transport_local Stage B; LJ terms are iodine/bromide analogues, so absolute values are low-confidence.

speciation_notes.source: R195 readable exports use beta_I2 ~= 1487; v1c qualitatively supports I3 more than I2Br but does not set K directly.
speciation_notes.split_basis: I3:I2Br split uses mesoscale fallback weights K_I2_I*cI : K_I2_Br*cBr at 1 M ZnI2 + 4 M NH4Br, with free I2 forced to one molecule for finite-box D diagnostics.
speciation_notes.finite_box_note: True beta_eff free-I2 fraction is below one molecule in this 3.4 nm box; one free I2 molecule is retained to estimate neutral-I2 mobility and is excluded from over-interpretation.
